---
title: "An evaluation of the impact of social determinants of health in military reservists"
author:
  - name: Brian A. Moore
    orcid: 0000-0003-0273-7236
    affiliation: AMES Research Center, Kennesaw State University
  - name: Chris Hess
    #orcid: 0000-0003-0273-7236
    affiliation: AMES Research Center, Kennesaw State University
  - name: Kimberly Gomes
    #orcid: 0000-0003-0273-7236
    #affiliation: AMES Research Center, Kennesaw State University
  - name: Tyler L. Collette
    affiliation: AMES Research Center, Kennesaw State University
  - name: Thomas J. Hodges
    orcid: 0000-0002-5184-7346
    affiliation: AMES Research Center, Kennesaw State University
  - name: Kristin A. Horan
    affiliation: AMES Research Center, Kennesaw State University
  - name: Bianca Channer
    affiliation: AMES Research Center, Kennesaw State University
  - name: Katherine E. Moore
    affiliation: AMES Research Center, Kennesaw State University
  - name: Patricia Ross
    affiliation: Georgia Department of Veterans Services
  - name: Israel Sánchez-Cardona
    affiliation: AMES Research Center, Kennesaw State University
type: "Journal Article"
categories:
  - Health
toc: false
---

## Abstract

## Citation

Moore, B. A., Hess, C., Gomes, K. D., Collette, T. L., Horan, K., Channer, B., **Hodges, T.J.**, Moore, K. E., Ross, P. M., & Sanchez-Cardona, I. (2025). An Evaluation of the Impact of Social Determinants of Health in Military Reservists. *Military Psychology*.
